nl_query: For each active evaluation attempt, show the script URN, student name, evaluator name, assignment type, attempt type, section name if split, current status, total marks, and the number of marks entries.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.urn, sc.name AS student_name, fc.name AS evaluator_name, sa.assignment_type, ea.attempt_type, CASE WHEN sa.section_id IS NOT NULL THEN qs.name ELSE NULL END AS section_name, ea.status, ea.total_marks, COUNT(em.id) AS num_evaluation_marks
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.id = a.student_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = ea.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
LEFT JOIN question_section qs ON qs.id = sa.section_id
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  ea.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'PARTIALLY_FROZEN', 'FROZEN')
GROUP BY a.urn, sc.name, fc.name, sa.assignment_type, ea.attempt_type, CASE WHEN sa.section_id IS NOT NULL THEN qs.name ELSE NULL END, ea.status, ea.total_marks
ORDER BY ea.attempt_type, a.urn;
error: Validation failed (schema): Table or alias 'ea' is referenced (e.g. in an ON clause or SELECT list) but is not declared in the FROM/JOIN clauses. Add the missing table to the FROM list, or check JOIN ordering — a JOIN's ON clause cannot reference a table that appears later in the JOIN chain.
